Mtn To Compel Physical Exam Of Pltf Reider; Mtn For Reimbursement & Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel an independent medical examination is moot. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to make a timely, reasonable, and good faith effort to resolve the matters in dispute. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $700 are to be paid on or before April 26, 2006. ORDER SIGNED. Comm. Bruce E. Chan.

Mtn For Protective Order (Joinder)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. The joinder in the motion by defendant Carquest Corporation is granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Joinder In Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. The joinder in the motion by defendants Ford Motor Company, General Motors Corporation and Mazda North American Operations is granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Motion For Protective Order Re The Dates And Location Of Pltf'S Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant Volkswagen of America, Inc.'s motion for a protective order is granted in part. No opposition has been filed. The deposition of plaintiff is stayed until after January 23, 2006. The deposition shall resume at a time and place mutually convenient to the parties, limited to two non-consecutive sessions per week. If the parties agree to move the location of the deposition to Jackson, California, defendants are ordered to provide a hotel for plaintiff. Prevailing party to submit form of order.

Defendant Actuant Corporation's motion for a protective order was withdrawn. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
